name: polling scheduler: records the resolved cadence into the provenance standards_state block
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/poll-scheduler.sh" --source-id aws-well-architected --fetch-frequency 5m --now-ms 0 --last-fetch-ms 0 --emit-provenance "$PWD/prov.json" && grep -q standards_state prov.json && grep -q aws-well-architected prov.json && grep -q 300000 prov.json && echo prov-ok 1>&2
